evals.name: all-time-chinese
evals.prompt: 帮我做个 token 年度报告
evals.expected_output: Folder at ~/Desktop/tokenbar-report-YYYY-MM-DD/ containing index.html + 7 themed persona HTML files + data.json. Narrative in Chinese. Window covers full TokenBar data range (all-time).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 7 persona HTML files (01-comic.html through 07-ft.html) present
index.html present and links to all 7 persona files
data.json present, parses as JSON, has cost.totalUSD > 0 and dataWindow.eventCount > 0
every persona HTML opens in a browser without console errors and contains at least 3 <svg> elements
no leftover '{{placeholder}}' tokens anywhere in any rendered HTML
narrative text in every persona is in Chinese (matching the prompt's language)
the 7 persona themes are visually distinct — at minimum, their <style> blocks differ by > 60% content hash
the same personality_tag appears in every persona HTML (shared synthesis, different voices)
the time window in the report matches the TokenBar database's earliest..latest range

evals.name: windowed-30d-mixed
evals.prompt: 最近一个月我在 AI 上烧了多少？做个 html wrap 看看
evals.expected_output: Same output structure as eval 1 but time window narrowed to the last 30 days. Numbers must reflect the narrower window (smaller token counts, fewer events).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 7 persona HTML files + index.html present
date_range_days in the report equals 30 (±1)
total_tokens in the report is strictly less than the all-time figure
before generation, the assistant confirmed the time window with the user OR explicitly stated the inferred window
narrative is in Chinese with informal register (matches the user's casual phrasing)

evals.name: english-quarter
evals.prompt: Generate an HTML report of my AI coding usage this quarter — show me how I've been spending tokens.
evals.expected_output: Same output structure, but narrative in English. Window covers the last calendar quarter (~90 days).

assertions.text: output folder exists under ~/Desktop matching tokenbar-report-* pattern
exactly 7 persona HTML files + index.html present
narrative text in every persona is in English (matching the prompt's language)
date_range_days is between 80 and 100 (i.e. roughly a quarter)
no Chinese characters appear in the narrative fields of any persona (the visual chrome may still contain '#04' etc., but the persona blurbs must be English)
the ft (Financial Times) persona uses ROI / quarterly framing in the narrative
